name: Hot Anchovy Dip (Bagna Cauda)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, olive oil, black pepper, and anchovies in a saucepan.
2. Cook on low heat for 10 minutes until the anchovies have dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture into a fondue pot or chafing dish to keep warm.
4. Surround with slices of artichokes and raw vegetables.
5. Leftover dip may be used as sauce on pasta.
